title: CapitalFunding
description: A DCLA capital funding record for a cultural organization in a fiscal year — construction/renovation/equipment dollars, broken out by source (DCLA, City Council, Borough President). Canonical schema reconciling 'DCLA Cultural Organizations Capital Funding' (7hgn-sgmk, 6 columns). Keyed on Organization + Fiscal Year.

totalFunding.description: Total capital funding in dollars ('Total Funding').

cityCouncilFunding.description: Portion from the City Council ('City Council Funding').

boroughPresidentFunding.description: Portion from Borough Presidents ('Borough President Funding').
